name: Wander
subtitle: Free location spoofer for iPhone
description: Wander — set your iPhone's GPS anywhere. Teleport, live joystick, and realistic route playback. Free and open-source.

apps.name: Wander
apps.subtitle: Set your GPS anywhere — free.
apps.localizedDescription:
Wander sets your iPhone's location to anywhere in the world, on-device and free.

• Teleport — search an address or drop a pin and go
• Joystick — an on-screen stick that moves you in real time
• Route — drive a real road route at realistic speed (paces to the real ETA, slows for turns)
• Places — saved, recent, and famous landmark locations
• Natural jitter, km/h ⇄ mph, and an in-app setup checklist

A free, open-source alternative to paid tools like iMyFone AnyTo and Tenorshare iAnyGo. Requires iOS 17+, Developer Mode, a pairing file, and a tunnel (LocalDevVPN on a free Apple ID). See the GitHub README for setup.
apps.versionDescription: Big anti-ban + stability update. New: a soft-ban cooldown timer with a live 'safe to catch/spin' countdown; a speed governor that keeps movement under ban-triggering speeds; GPS 'breathing' so a parked location looks natural instead of frozen; a tunnel health indicator with best-effort auto-reconnect and a low-memory warning; pre-flight checks (Precise Location + network-vs-GPS mismatch); resume-your-spoof after an interruption; and an expanded Error 11/12 + tunnel help guide with a plain-language ban ladder.
